data.name: Description
data.value: Import infrastructure resources into an Aspire AppHost project

data.name: AzureSubcommandDescription
data.value: Import Azure resources from a live resource group into an Aspire AppHost project

data.name: BicepSubcommandDescription
data.value: Import Azure resources from Bicep files into an Aspire AppHost project

data.name: TerraformSubcommandDescription
data.value: Import resources from Terraform files into an Aspire AppHost project

data.name: SubscriptionOption
data.value: The Azure subscription ID to use

data.name: ResourceGroupOption
data.value: The Azure resource group to import from

data.name: OutputOption
data.value: The output directory for the generated AppHost project

data.name: NameOption
data.value: The name for the generated AppHost project

data.name: PathOption
data.value: Path to the directory containing infrastructure files

data.name: ModeOption
data.value: Import mode: 'new' (default) generates Add*() calls for Aspire-managed provisioning, 'existing' references pre-deployed resources with .RunAsExisting()

data.name: AuthenticatingWithAzure
data.value: Authenticating with Azure...

data.name: SelectSubscription
data.value: Select an Azure subscription

data.name: SelectResourceGroup
data.value: Select a resource group

data.name: DiscoveringResources
data.value: Discovering resources...

data.name: SelectResources
data.value: Select which resources to import

data.name: NoResourcesFound
data.value: No resources were found in the selected source.

data.name: GeneratingAppHost
data.value: Generating AppHost project...

data.name: ImportComplete
data.value: Successfully imported {0} resources into {1}

data.name: ConfirmImport
data.value: Import {0} resources to '{1}'?

data.name: UnsupportedResourceSkipped
data.value: Resource '{0}' ({1}) has no Aspire equivalent and will be added as a comment.

data.name: ComputeResourceDetected
data.value: Compute resource '{0}' detected — a placeholder will be generated.

data.name: AuthenticationFailed
data.value: Failed to authenticate with Azure. Please ensure you are logged in with 'az login' or have valid credentials configured.

data.name: ResourceDiscoveryFailed
data.value: Failed to discover resources: {0}

data.name: CompilingBicep
data.value: Compiling Bicep to ARM template...

data.name: ParsingTerraformFiles
data.value: Parsing Terraform files...

data.name: BicepCliNotFound
data.value: The Bicep CLI was not found. Install it from https://learn.microsoft.com/azure/azure-resource-manager/bicep/install or use 'az bicep install'.

data.name: NoBicepFilesFound
data.value: No .bicep files were found in the specified directory.

data.name: NoTerraformFilesFound
data.value: No .tf files were found in the specified directory.

data.name: NoIaCResourcesFound
data.value: No importable resources were found in the infrastructure files.

data.name: BicepCompileFailed
data.value: Failed to compile Bicep file: {0}

data.name: BicepImportFailed
data.value: Failed to import Bicep resources: {0}

data.name: TerraformImportFailed
data.value: Failed to import Terraform resources: {0}

data.name: TerraformFileAccessFailed
data.value: Failed to access Terraform files: {0}

data.name: IaCImportComplete
data.value: Successfully imported {0} resources from {1} into {2}

data.name: AzureFileAccessFailed
data.value: Failed to access files during Azure import: {0}

data.name: AzureImportFailed
data.value: Failed to import Azure resources: {0}
